name: SwarmGrid-Edge Forklift Safety API
description: Deterministic tool-calling surface for the autonomous forklift safety agent. FunctionGemma 270M uses this schema to emit structured JSON actions.

tools.name: trigger_ebrake
tools.description: Immediately engage the forklift emergency brake. Used when a hazard is detected within the 5-meter safety perimeter.

reason.description: Human-readable description of the hazard that triggered the brake.

severity.description: Severity classification of the detected hazard.

distance_meters.description: Estimated distance to the hazard in meters.

confidence.description: Model confidence score for the detection.

tools.name: reduce_speed
tools.description: Reduce forklift speed to a safer velocity. Used when a potential hazard is detected beyond the immediate safety perimeter but within the caution zone (5-10 meters).

target_mph.description: Target speed in miles per hour.

tools.name: maintain_course
tools.description: Continue at current speed and heading. Used when the path ahead is clear with no detected hazards.

tools.name: broadcast_reroute
tools.description: Broadcast a reroute signal to the swarm network, instructing nearby forklifts to take an alternate path.

blocked_zone.description: Identifier or description of the blocked zone.

duration_seconds.description: Estimated duration of the blockage in seconds.
